requirementGroup.label: Courses
notes: Parsed from a source section heading and the following course rows.

displayCourseCodes: EDUC 280 - Introduction to Education, Communities and Organizations
options.title: An introduction to the ECO program and major content areas: learning theory, human development, educational organizational theory, community-based methods, ecological theory and asset-based community development. Students also explore the multitude of careers that utilize the skills of teaching and learning. What is "education" and how can we support equitable teaching and learning in communities?
options.label: EDUC 280 - Introduction to Education, Communities and Organizations
